briefdescription.para: The result for the walk function call.
The nesting or heading level used by structural nodes.

memberdef.argsstring: (Type type, std::optional< std::u32string > text, std::optional< std::string > identifier, std::optional< std::string > style, std::optional< std::string > data, Level level) noexcept
memberdef.name: TextNode

briefdescription.para: Create a node with explicit metadata.

parameterdescription.para: Optional node-specific payload such as a link target or language.

briefdescription.para: Create a node with a type and otherwise empty metadata.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Type type, std::u32string text, const Level level=0) noexcept
memberdef.name: TextNode

briefdescription.para: Create a node with inline text content.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Type type, const Level level) noexcept
memberdef.name: TextNode

briefdescription.para: Create a node with a type and explicit level.
Render this node tree into a human-readable diagnostic tree.

detaileddescription.para:
Each entry contains one node with metadata, indented by the given number of spaces per depth level.
indent
The number of spaces for each nesting level.
The rendered diagnostic lines.

briefdescription.para: Test if this node currently owns child nodes.

simplesect.para: true if child nodes are present.

briefdescription.para: Test if this node has a parent.

simplesect.para: true if a parent node is set.
The parent node, or nullptr if there is none.

briefdescription.para: Append one child node and update its parent reference.

simplesect.para: The UTF-32 text content, or an empty string if none is stored.
The style or class value, if set.

parameterdescription.para: The new style or class value.

briefdescription.para: Access the optional node-specific data payload.
Replace the optional node-specific data payload.
Get the heading or nesting level.
Set the heading or nesting level.

detaileddescription.para:
If the called function returns WalkResult::Stop, the walk will stop and return immediately.
Continue if the walk completed, Stop if the walk was stopped by the function.

briefdescription.para: Recursively walk the node tree and return true if one fn(node) call returns true.

parameterdescription.para: A function with the signature fn(const TextNode &node) -> bool.

simplesect.para: True if any node matches the predicate, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Create a node with the given type using default metadata, empty text, and level 0.
Create a placeholder node for unsupported content.
Test if the given node type is an inline container node.

simplesect.para: true for inline container nodes, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Test if the given node type can directly contain parsed text.

simplesect.para: true if parsed text can be appended directly, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Test if the given node type is a list container.

simplesect.para: true for bullet or numbered lists, otherwise false.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::vector< std::string > &lines, const TextNode &node, std::size_t depth, std::size_t indent) noexcept
memberdef.name: appendDiagnosticTree

memberdef.argsstring: (const TextNode &node, std::size_t depth, std::size_t indent) noexcept
memberdef.name: renderDiagnosticLine

briefdescription.para: A node in the text tree.
